title: Daily JLPT Growth Pack 19
objective: Extend the curriculum with a compact study mission generated by the daily CI/CD pipeline.
activity: Complete one flashcard, one sentence, one recall check, and one reflection note.

microQuiz.q: What is the focus of this daily pack?
microQuiz.a: active recall and steady JLPT progress

microQuiz.q: What should be done after answering?

title: JLPT Micro Quiz Day
objective: Practice multiple-choice recognition under light time pressure.
activity: Answer 8 questions in 4 minutes, then review mistakes.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: JLPT Micro Quiz Day?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Answer 8 questions in 4 minutes, then review mistakes.

title: Kanji Stroke Awareness
objective: Notice stroke order logic for 日 and 人.
activity: Trace each kanji 10 times with correct direction.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: Kanji Stroke Awareness?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Trace each kanji 10 times with correct direction.

title: Review Sprint: First Sentences
objective: Combine greetings, identity, nationality, and questions.
activity: Complete a 10-question self-check and mark weak patterns.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: Review Sprint: First Sentences?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Complete a 10-question self-check and mark weak patterns.

title: Particle の for Possession
objective: Say “my book”, “teacher’s notebook”, and simple relationships.
activity: Create 8 の phrases and read them aloud.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: Particle の for Possession?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Create 8 の phrases and read them aloud.

title: Classroom Nouns Pack
objective: Learn book, notebook, pencil, desk, chair, and classroom.
activity: Label 6 items around you in Japanese.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: Classroom Nouns Pack?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Label 6 items around you in Japanese.

title: This/That/Over There: これ・それ・あれ
objective: Use demonstratives to point to objects in context.
activity: Write 6 object sentences using これ/それ/あれ.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: This/That/Over There: これ・それ・あれ?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Write 6 object sentences using これ/それ/あれ.

title: Numbers 1–10 Launchpad
objective: Recognize and pronounce ichi to juu with rhythm.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: Numbers 1–10 Launchpad?
How should you finish the study session?

title: Mini Reading: Self Introduction
objective: Read a short paragraph and answer who/what/where questions.
activity: Underline every です and translate the sentence endings.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: Mini Reading: Self Introduction?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Underline every です and translate the sentence endings.

title: Greetings by Time of Day
objective: Choose natural greetings for morning, afternoon, and evening.
activity: Listen to or read the greeting prompts twice, slow then natural.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: Greetings by Time of Day?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Listen to or read the greeting prompts twice, slow then natural.

title: Polite Correction: ちがいます
objective: Practice saying “no, that is not correct” politely.
activity: Record or read aloud 5 correction dialogues.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: Polite Correction: ちがいます?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Record or read aloud 5 correction dialogues.

title: 日・本・人・語 Kanji Web
objective: Connect the first 4 kanji into meaningful vocabulary networks.
activity: Make 4 kanji flashcards with one compound each.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: 日・本・人・語 Kanji Web?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Make 4 kanji flashcards with one compound each.

title: Country + 人 / 語
objective: Build nationality and language words for Indonesia, Japan, America, and Korea.
activity: Create a mini profile: name, nationality, language.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: Country + 人 / 語?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Create a mini profile: name, nationality, language.

title: Question Sentences with か
objective: Turn polite statements into simple questions using か.
activity: Write 6 yes/no questions using ですか.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: Question Sentences with か?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Write 6 yes/no questions using ですか.

title: Particle は vs です
objective: Understand how は marks the topic and です closes a polite sentence.
activity: Read 5 self-introduction sentences and identify the topic marker.

microQuiz.q: What is today’s main focus: Particle は vs です?
How should you finish the study session?
microQuiz.a: Read 5 self-introduction sentences and identify the topic marker.
